recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A college prank at an abandoned house accidentally awakens a frightening spirit.

recommendations.title: Shock
recommendations.overview: A couple is terrorized in their new house haunted by the vengeful ghost of the woman's former husband who possesses her young son.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: Outer Space
recommendations.overview: A young woman move towards a house that holds a potentially dangerous spirit that has been tormenting her. The woman tries to fight against the film itself as it starts to cause the world to collapse.

recommendations.title: Ring 0
recommendations.overview: Taking place thirty years before the events of Ringu, Ringu 0 provides the shocking background story of how the girl on the video became a deadly, vengeful spirit.

recommendations.title: The Elixir
recommendations.overview: An elixir unleashes the undead in a village. A family at odds with one another must unite and fight to survive as their hometown collapses.

recommendations.title: Aloha Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: The Mystery Gang goes to Hawaii for the Big Kahuna of Hanahuna Surfing Contest. However, the gang and the locals find the island invaded by the vengeful Wiki Tiki spirit and his demons.

recommendations.title: Grimcutty
recommendations.overview: A suburban teen girl and her little brother must stop a terrifying internet meme brought to life by the hysteria of their parents.

recommendations.title: Tower of Terror
recommendations.overview: A disgraced reporter investigates an abandoned luxury hotel where five people mysteriously disappeared sixty years earlier.
